name: Malaekahana Beach
tagline: A mile of empty gold sand with a tiny island you can walk to at low tide — North Shore's best-kept secret.
parking: Free state park lot off Kamehameha Hwy
hours: Open daily, 7:00 AM – 7:45 PM (gates locked at closing)
bestTime: Low tide to walk to Goat Island (Mokuauia); check tide charts before going
talkStory: Wade to Goat Island (Mokuauia) at low tide — wear reef shoes, the crossing is rocky. The island has its own tiny beach on the far side. Camping available with state permit. One of the least crowded beaches on Oahu even on weekends.
